title: Verify discount offer appears when user persists with cancellation
description: Test that after dismissing loss aversion, user receives a discount offer to convert the exit intent
preconditions: Discount offer is enabled from backend
User clicked Cancel on loss aversion pop-up

steps.description: 2. Click 'Cancel Trial' to trigger loss aversion pop-up
3. Click 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access' on loss aversion pop-up

expected_result: Discount offer pop-up appears with offer title, discounted price from backend, and 'Lock in 50% off your first month now' messaging with trust clause about paid subscription starting after trial ends
